fault_codes.description: EXTERNAL PROBE interrupted
manufacturer_steps: Check the wiring, if needed replace the external probe

source_refs.source_quote: 09 0 EXTERNAL PROBE interrupted Check the wiring, if needed replace the external probe

fault_codes.description: RETURN PROBE Auxiliary (SRR) sensor interrupted
manufacturer_steps: Check the wiring, if needed replace the auxiliary sensor (22)

source_refs.source_quote: 14 1 RETURN PROBE Auxiliary (SRR) sensor interrupted Check the wiring, if needed replace the auxiliary sensor (22)

fault_codes.description: SERVICE PARAMETERS Service parameters altered due to possible electromagnetic interferences
manufacturer_steps: Reset the altered parameters via the panel and/or regolafacile

source_refs.source_quote: 30 2 SERVICE PARAMETERS Service parameters altered due to possible electromagnetic interferences Reset the altered parameters via the panel and/or regolafacile

fault_codes.description: POOR WATER CIRCULATION Poor circulation in primary circuit
manufacturer_steps: Check pump operation (12) and speed, if there are any obstructions or system closure.

source_refs.source_quote: 21 3 POOR WATER CIRCULATION Poor circulation in primary circuit Check pump operation (12) and speed, if there are any obstructions or system closure.

fault_codes.description: FLAME CONTROL FREQUENCY BEYOND LIMIT
possible_causes: Depends on the power supply mains (Frequency and voltage beyond default limits)
manufacturer_steps: Wait for the values to return to the default limits

source_refs.source_quote: 17 4 FLAME CONTROL FREQUENCY BEYOND LIMIT Depends on the power supply mains (Frequency and voltage beyond default limits) Wait for the values to return to the default limits

fault_codes.description: WATER CIRCULATION INSUFFICIENT Primary circuit water circulation insufficient (At > 35° C)
possible_causes: Primary circuit water circulation insufficient (At > 35° C)
manufacturer_steps: Check pump operation (12) and speed - remove any heating system obstructions - clean the scaled domestic hot water exchanger

source_refs.source_quote: 15 5 WATER CIRCULATION INSUFFICIENT Primary circuit water circulation insufficient (At > 35° C) Check pump operation (12) and speed - remove any heating system obstructions - clean the scaled domestic hot water exchanger

fault_codes.description: INCORRECT SENSOR POSITIONING Flow and return sensors inverted
manufacturer_steps: Check the wiring (11) (22)

source_refs.source_quote: 22 6 INCORRECT SENSOR POSITIONING Flow and return sensors inverted Check the wiring (11) (22)

fault_codes.description: SPEED OUT OF CONTROL Alteration of the fan speed; the speed is not reached.
possible_causes: Alteration of the fan speed; the speed is not reached.
manufacturer_steps: Check fan operation (18) and the connections.

source_refs.source_quote: 24 7 SPEED OUT OF CONTROL Alteration of the fan speed; the speed is not reached. Check fan operation (18) and the connections.

fault_codes.description: SPEED OUT OF CONTROL Alteration of the fan speed; the speed is above that requested.
possible_causes: Alteration of the fan speed; the speed is above that requested.
manufacturer_steps: Check fan operation (18) and the connections.

source_refs.source_quote: 26 8 SPEED OUT OF CONTROL Alteration of the fan speed; the speed is above that requested. Check fan operation (18) and the connections.

fault_codes.description: HIGH TEMPERATURE Boiler temperature too high.
manufacturer_steps: Check pump operation and if needed clean the exchanger (24)

source_refs.source_quote: 6 8 HIGH TEMPERATURE Boiler temperature too high. Check pump operation and if needed clean the exchanger (24)

fault_codes.description: WATER DEFICIENCY Insufficient water pressure and consequent intervention of the minimum water pressure - pressure switch (13).
possible_causes: intervention of the minimum water pressure - pressure switch (13).
manufacturer_steps: Fill the heating circuit as described in chap. 3.8 and wait for the values to return within default limits.
If needed, check the electrical connections and replace the minimum water pressure switch.

source_refs.source_quote: 8 9 WATER DEFICIENCY Insufficient water pressure and consequent intervention of the minimum water pressure - pressure switch (13). Fill the heating circuit as described in chap. 3.8 and wait for the values to return within default limits. If needed, check the electrical connections and replace the minimum water pressure switch.

fault_codes.description: EXCHANGER FREEZING (24) Exchanger freezing is detected If the heating sensor detects a temperature below 2° C, burner ignition is inhibited until the sensor detects a temperature above 5°C.
possible_causes: heating sensor detects a temperature below 2° C
manufacturer_steps: Disconnect the from the power supply, close the gas valve, defrost the exchanger carefully.

source_refs.source_quote: 16 10 EXCHANGER FREEZING (24) Exchanger freezing is detected If the heating sensor detects a temperature below 2° C, burner ignition is inhibited until the sensor detects a temperature above 5°C. Disconnect the from the power supply, close the gas valve, defrost the exchanger carefully.

fault_codes.description: SAFETY THERMOSTAT Intervention of the safety thermostat (10).
manufacturer_steps: Press the unblock button on the panel and/or check that the thermostat or its connections are not interrupted.

source_refs.source_quote: LIMIT THERM. 11 SAFETY THERMOSTAT Intervention of the safety thermostat (10). Press the unblock button on the panel and/or check that the thermostat or its connections are not interrupted.

fault_codes.description: DOMESTIC HOT WATER SENSOR Domestic hot water sensor fault (1).
manufacturer_steps: Check the efficiency of the sensor (see table Res/Temp) (Par.4) and its connections.

source_refs.source_quote: 13 12 DOMESTIC HOT WATER SENSOR Domestic hot water sensor fault (1). Check the efficiency of the sensor (see table Res/Temp) (Par.4) and its connections.

fault_codes.description: HEATING SENSOR (11) Heating sensor fault.
manufacturer_steps: Check the efficiency of the sensor (see table Res/Temp) (Par.4) and its connections.

source_refs.source_quote: 12 13 HEATING SENSOR (11) Heating sensor fault. Check the efficiency of the sensor (see table Res/Temp) (Par.4) and its connections.

fault_codes.description: FACTORY PARAMETERS Alteration of the factory parameters due to possible electromagnetic interferences.
manufacturer_steps: Press the unblock key; if the anomaly persists, replace the board.

source_refs.source_quote: 38 14 FACTORY PARAMETERS Alteration of the factory parameters due to possible electromagnetic interferences. Press the unblock key; if the anomaly persists, replace the board.

fault_codes.description: BLOCK No gas or failed burner ignition
manufacturer_steps: Check the gas supply or that the ignition/detection electrode is working properly (4)

source_refs.source_quote: 4 15 BLOCK No gas or failed burner ignition Check the gas supply or that the ignition/detection electrode is working properly (4)

fault_codes.description: PARASITE FLAME Flame detected upon ignition.
manufacturer_steps: Check the wiring of the Ign/Det. electrode and remove any oxidation, check for humidity between drain wire and ceramic, if necessary, press the unblock key, if the anomaly persists, replace the electrode (4).

source_refs.source_quote: 11 16 PARASITE FLAME Flame detected upon ignition. Check the wiring of the Ign/Det. electrode and remove any oxidation, check for humidity between drain wire and ceramic, if necessary, press the unblock key, if the anomaly persists, replace the electrode (4).

fault_codes.description: PARASITE FLAME Flame detected after switch-off.
manufacturer_steps: Check the wiring and for any leaks from the gas valve (3) (3) if needed replace the gas valve.

source_refs.source_quote: 20 17 PARASITE FLAME Flame detected after swtich-off. Check the wiring and for any leaks from the gas valve (3) (3) if needed replace the gas valve.

fault_codes.description: FLUE GAS COLLECTOR SAFETY THERMOSTAT Intervention of the flue gas collector safety thermostat (23).
possible_causes: Intervention of the flue gas collector safety thermostat (23).
manufacturer_steps: Check the wiring

source_refs.source_quote: 46 18 FLUE GAS COLLECTOR SAFETY THERMOSTAT Intervention of the flue gas collector safety thermostat (23). Check the wiring

fault_codes.description: FLAME CONTROL Flame control damaged
manufacturer_steps: Replace the board.

source_refs.source_quote: 19 22 FLAME CONTROL Flame control damaged Replace the board.

source_refs.source_quote: The procedure has a duration of 10 minutes and for the entire time of the procedure the display shows AP flashing.

safety_warnings.text: At the end of its life cycle the product must not be disposed of as urban waste. It can be taken to a special recycling centre managed by the local authorities, or to a dealer who offers this service. Separate disposal of a domestic appliance avoids possible negative consequences for the environment and human health deriving from inappropriate waste handling and allows the recovery of the materials of which it is made, in order to obtain significant energy and resource savings.

source_refs.source_quote: Provisions for proper disposal of the product. At the end of its life cycle the product must not be disposed of as urban waste. It can be taken to a special recycling centre managed by the local authorities, or to a dealer who offers this service. Separate disposal of a domestic appliance avoids possible negative consequences for the environment and human health deriving from inappropriate waste handling and allows the recovery of the materials of which it is made, in order to obtain significant energy and resource savings.

safety_warnings.text: The instruction booklet is an integral and essential part of the product and must be kept by the user.

source_refs.source_quote: The instruction booklet is an integral and essential part of the product and must be kept by the user.

safety_warnings.text: Read the warnings contained in this instruction booklet carefully as they provide important guidelines regarding installation, use and maintenance safety. Keep the booklet with care for further consultation.

source_refs.source_quote: Read the warnings contained in this instruction booklet carefully as they provide important guidelines regarding installation, use and maintenance safety. Keep the booklet with care for further consultation.

safety_warnings.text: Installation and maintenance must be performed in compliance with the standards in force according to the instructions of the manufacturer, up to standard and by personnel qualified and certified in compliance with law.

source_refs.source_quote: Installation and maintenance must be performed in compliance with the standards in force according to the instructions of the manufacturer, up to standard and by personnel qualified and certified in compliance with law.

safety_warnings.text: Systems for the production of domestic hot water MUST be constructed entirely with compliant materials.

source_refs.source_quote: Systems for the production of domestic hot water MUST be constructed entirely with compliant materials.

safety_warnings.text: By professionally qualified personnel we mean: personnel with specific technical skill in the field of heating system components for civil use, domestic hot water production and maintenance. Personnel must have the qualifications provided for by current legislation.

source_refs.source_quote: By professionally qualified personnel we mean: personnel with specific technical skill in the field of heating system components for civil use, domestic hot water production and maintenance. Personnel must have the qualifications provided for by current legislation.

safety_warnings.text: Incorrect installation or improper maintenance can cause damage to persons, animals or objects for which the manufacturer is not responsible.

source_refs.source_quote: Incorrect installation or improper maintenance can cause damage to persons, animals or objects for which the manufacturer is not responsible.

safety_warnings.text: Before performing any cleaning or maintenance, disconnect the appliance from the energy mains by acting on the switch of the system and/or through the specific cut-off devices.

source_refs.source_quote: Before performing any cleaning or maintenance, disconnect the appliance from the energy mains by acting on the switch of the system and/or through the specific cut-off devices.

safety_warnings.text: Do not obstruct the terminals of the intake/exhaust ducts.

source_refs.source_quote: Do not obstruct the terminals of the intake/exhaust ducts.

safety_warnings.text: In case of failure and/or malfunctioning of the appliance, switch it off and do not try to repair it or intervene on it directly. Contact only personnel qualified in compliance with law.

source_refs.source_quote: In case of failure and/or malfunctioning of the appliance, switch it off and do not try to repair it or intervene on it directly. Contact only personnel qualified in compliance with law.

safety_warnings.text: Any repairs must be performed solely by personnel authorised by Unical AG S.p.A., using original spare parts only. Failure to comply with the above can compromise the safety of the appliance and void the warranty.

source_refs.source_quote: Any repairs must be performed solely by personnel authorised by Unical AG S.p.A., using original spare parts only. Failure to comply with the above can compromise the safety of the appliance and void the warranty.

safety_warnings.text: To guarantee appliance efficiency and its correct operation, yearly maintenance must be performed by qualified personnel.

source_refs.source_quote: To guarantee appliance efficiency and its correct operation, yearly maintenance must be performed by qualified personnel.

safety_warnings.text: Should you decide not to use the appliance, parts entailing potential sources of hazard must be made safe.

source_refs.source_quote: Should you decide not to use the appliance, parts entailing potential sources of hazard must be made safe.

safety_warnings.text: Before commissioning an appliance that has not been used, wash the domestic hot water production system, making the water flow until it has been fully replaced.

source_refs.source_quote: Before commissioning an appliance that has not been used, wash the domestic hot water production system, making the water flow until it has been fully replaced.

safety_warnings.text: Should the appliance be sold or transferred to a new owner or if you move and leave the appliance, always make sure that the instruction booklet accompanies it in order to be consulted by the new owner and/or installer.

source_refs.source_quote: Should the appliance be sold or transferred to a new owner or if you move and leave the appliance, always make sure that the instruction booklet accompanies it in order to be consulted by the new owner and/or installer.

safety_warnings.text: Only original accessories must be used for all appliances with optionals or kits (including electric).

source_refs.source_quote: Only original accessories must be used for all appliances with optionals or kits (including electric).

safety_warnings.text: This appliance is intended solely for the use for which it was expressly designed. Any other use is to be considered improper and therefore dangerous (*).

source_refs.source_quote: This appliance is intended solely for the use for which it was expressly designed. Any other use is to be considered improper and therefore dangerous (*).

source_refs.source_quote: DANGER! Serious danger to safety and health

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION! Possible dangerous situation for the product and the environment

source_refs.source_quote: DANGER! Danger of burns!

safety_warnings.text: wear gloves protective

source_refs.source_quote: OBLIGATION! wear gloves protective

safety_warnings.text: The boiler has been built according to the current level of engineering and acknowledged technical safety rules. Nonetheless, if improperly used, dangers could arise for the safety and life of the user and other persons or damage to the equipment or other objects.

source_refs.source_quote: The boiler has been built according to the current level of engineering and acknowledged technical safety rules. Nonetheless, if improperly used, dangers could arise for the safety and life of the user and other persons or damage to the equipment or other objects.

safety_warnings.text: The appliance is designed to work in heating systems, with hot water circulation, for the production of domestic hot water. Any other use is considered improper.

source_refs.source_quote: The appliance is designed to work in heating systems, with hot water circulation, for the production of domestic hot water. Any other use is considered improper.

safety_warnings.text: For any damage resulting from improper use UNICAL AG. S.p.A. assumes no responsibility.

source_refs.source_quote: For any damage resulting from improper use UNICAL AG. S.p.A. assumes no responsibility.

safety_warnings.text: Use according to the intended purposes also includes strict compliance with the instructions in this manual.

source_refs.source_quote: Use according to the intended purposes also includes strict compliance with the instructions in this manual.

safety_warnings.text: Deliver these instructions to the user, as well as other documents concerning the appliance inserted in the envelope inside the packaging. The user must keep this documentation safe for future consultation.

source_refs.source_quote: Deliver these instructions to the user, as well as other documents concerning the appliance inserted in the envelope inside the packaging. The user must keep this documentation safe for future consultation.

safety_warnings.topic: Air Vents and Flue Gas System
safety_warnings.text: Inform the user about the importance of the air vents and the flue gas exhaust system, highlighting their essential features and the absolute prohibition of modifying them.

source_refs.source_quote: Inform the user about the importance of the air vents and the flue gas exhaust system, high- lighting their essential features and the absolute prohibition of modifying them.

safety_warnings.text: Inform the user concerning controlling the system's water pressure as well as operations to restore it.

source_refs.source_quote: Inform the user concerning controlling the system's water pressure as well as operations to restore it.

safety_warnings.text: Inform the user concerning correct temperature control, control units/thermostats and radiators for saving energy.

source_refs.source_quote: Inform the user concerning correct temperature control, control units/thermostats and radiators for saving energy.

safety_warnings.text: Please note that, in compliance with the standards in force, the inspection and maintenance of the appliance must be carried out in compliance with the regulations and frequency indicated by the manufacturer.

source_refs.source_quote: Please note that, in compliance with the standards in force, the inspection and maintenance of the appliance must be carried out in compliance with the regulations and frequency indicated by the manufacturer.

safety_warnings.text: Should the appliance be sold or transferred to a new owner or if you move and leave the appliance, always make sure that the instruction booklet accompanies it in order to be consulted by the new owner and/or installer.

source_refs.source_quote: Should the appliance be sold or transferred to a new owner or if you move and leave the appliance, always make sure that the instruction booklet accompanies it in order to be consulted by the new owner and/or installer.

safety_warnings.text: The manufacturer will not be held liable in the event of damage to persons, animals or objects resulting from failure to comply with the instructions contained in this manual.

source_refs.source_quote: The manufacturer will not be held liable in the event of damage to persons, animals or objects resulting from failure to comply with the instructions contained in this manual.

safety_warnings.text: The boiler cannot be used by children. The boiler can be used by adults and only after having carefully read the user's manual. Children should be supervised to ensure that they do not play or tamper with the device.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION! The boiler cannot be used by children. The boiler can be used by adults and only after having carefully read the user's manual. Children should be supervised to ensure that they do not play or tamper with the device.

safety_warnings.text: The appliance must be installed, adjusted and maintained by professionally qualified personnel, in compliance with the standards and provisions in force. Incorrect installation can cause damage to persons, animals and objects for which the manufacturer cannot be held responsible.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION! The appliance must be installed, adjusted and maintained by professionally qualified personnel, in compliance with the standards and provisions in force. Incorrect installation can cause damage to persons, animals and objects for which the manufacturer cannot be held responsible.

safety_warnings.text: NEVER attempt performing maintenance or repairs on the boiler on your own initiative. Any work must be done by professionally qualified personnel. We recommend stipulating a maintenance contract. Insufficient or irregular maintenance can jeopardise the operating safety of the appliance and cause damage to persons, animals and objects for which the manufacturer cannot be held responsible.

source_refs.source_quote: DANGER! NEVER attempt performing maintenance or repairs on the boiler on your own initiative. Any work must be done by professionally qualified personnel. We recommend stipulating a maintenance contract. Insufficient or irregular maintenance can jeopardise the operating safety of the appliance and cause damage to persons, animals and objects for which the manufacturer cannot be held responsible.

safety_warnings.text: Do not modify the following parts: the boiler, the gas, air, water and electricity supply lines, the flue gas pipe, the safety valve and the exhaust pipe, the construction parts which affect the operating safety of the appliance

source_refs.source_quote: Changes to the parts connected to the appliance (once the appliance installation is complete) Do not modify the following parts: the boiler the gas, air, water and electricity supply lines the flue gas pipe, the safety valve and the exhaust pipe the construction parts which affect the operating safety of the appliance

safety_warnings.text: To tighten or loosen the screwed fittings, use only appropriate fixed spanners. Incompliant use and/or inappropriate tools can cause damage (e.g. water or gas leakage).

source_refs.source_quote: Attention! To tighten or loosen the screwed fittings, use only appropriate fixed spanners. Incompliant use and/or inappropriate tools can cause damage (e.g. water or gas leakage).

safety_warnings.text: Make sure that the gas tank has been deaerated before installing the appliance. For state-of-the-art tank venting, contact the LPG supplier or person qualified in compliance with the law requirement. If the tank has not been professionally deaerated, ignition problems could arise. In that case, contact the supplier of the LPG tank.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION! Indications for propane gas-fired appliances Make sure that the gas tank has been deaerated before installing the appliance. For state-of-the-art tank venting, contact the LPG supplier or person qualified in compliance with the law requirement. If the tank has not been professionally deaerated, ignition problems could arise. In that case, contact the supplier of the LPG tank.

safety_warnings.text: Should a smell of gas be perceived, follow these safety guidelines: do not turn electric switches on or off, do not smoke, do not use the telephone, close the gas shut-off valve, air out the area where the gas leakage has occurred, inform the gas supplier or a company specialised in installation and maintenance of heating systems.

source_refs.source_quote: Smell of gas Should a smell of gas be perceived, follow these safety guidelines: do not turn electric switches on or off do not smoke do not use the telephone close the gas shut-off valve air out the area where the gas leakage has occurred inform the gas supplier or a company specialised in installation and maintenance of heating systems.

safety_warnings.text: Do not use or store explosive or easily flammable materials (e.g. petrol, paints, paper) in the room where the appliance is installed.

source_refs.source_quote: Explosive and easily flammable substances Do not use or store explosive or easily flammable materials (e.g. petrol, paints, paper) in the room where the appliance is installed.

safety_warnings.text: Do not use the appliance as a supporting base for objects. In particular, do not place receptacles containing liquids (Bottles, Glasses, Jars or Detergents) on top of the appliance. If the appliance is installed inside a housing, do not insert or rest other objects inside this housing.

source_refs.source_quote: DANGER! Do not use the appliance as a supporting base for objects. In particular, do not place receptacles containing liquids (Bottles, Glasses, Jars or Detergents) on top of the appliance. If the appliance is installed inside a housing, do not insert or rest other objects inside this housing.

safety_warnings.text: ANY DAMAGE TO THE BOILER CAUSED BY THE FORMATION OF FOULING OR BY CORROSIVE WATER WILL NOT BE COVERED BY THE WARRANTY.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION! ANY DAMAGE TO THE BOILER CAUSED BY THE FORMATION OF FOULING OR BY CORROSIVE WATER WILL NOT BE COVERED BY THE WARRANTY.

safety_warnings.text: To minimise corrosion, it is crucial to use a corrosion inhibitor; in order for it to work properly, the metal surfaces must be clean.

source_refs.source_quote: To minimise corrosion, it is crucial to use a corrosion inhibitor; in order for it to work properly, the metal surfaces must be clean.

safety_warnings.text: The heating only models are NOT suitable for the production of water for human consumption according to Ministerial Decree D.M. 174/2004.

source_refs.source_quote: The heating only models are NOT suitable for the production of water for human consumption according to Ministerial Decree D.M. 174/2004.

safety_warnings.text: For outdoor installations, in partially protected places, it is necessary to use the additional resistance kit (optional) for the anti-freeze protection of the DHW and siphon fittings. Declared room temperature, with use of the resistance kit = -15 ° C.

source_refs.source_quote: For outdoor installations, in partially protected places, it is necessary to use the additional resistance kit (optional) for the anti-freeze protection of the DHW and siphon fittings. Declared room temperature, with use of the resistance kit = -15 ° C.

safety_warnings.text: This protection can intervene only if the electricity and gas supplies are connected.

source_refs.source_quote: This protection can intervene only if the electricity and gas supplies are connected.

safety_warnings.text: If one of the two is not available and upon reset 11 (SR) a temperature of < 2 °C is detected, the appliance will behave as described in tab. pos 2.

source_refs.source_quote: If one of the two is not available and upon reset 11 (SR) a temperature of < 2 °C is detected, the appliance will behave as described in tab. pos 2.

safety_warnings.text: The heating system can be protected effectively from frost by using antifreeze products with inhibitor for heating systems (specific for multidmetal)

source_refs.source_quote: The heating system can be protected effectively from frost by using antifreeze products with inhibitor for heating systems (specific for multidmetal)

safety_warnings.text: Do not use car engine antifreeze products as they could damage the water gaskets.

source_refs.source_quote: Do not use car engine antifreeze products as they could damage the water gaskets.

safety_warnings.text: This boiler is intended solely for the use for which it was expressly designed. Any other use is to be considered improper and therefore dangerous. This boiler heats water at a temperature lower than the atmospheric pressure boiling temperature.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION! This boiler is intended solely for the use for which it was expressly designed. Any other use is to be considered improper and therefore dangerous. This boiler heats water at a temperature lower than the atmospheric pressure boiling temperature.

safety_warnings.text: If there is dust and/or if there are aggressive/corrosive vapours present in the installation room, the appliance must be protected suitably and must be able to operate independently from the air in the room.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION! If there is dust and/or if there are aggressive/corrosive vapours present in the installation room, the appliance must be protected suitably and must be able to operate independently from the air in the room.

safety_warnings.text: Only mount the appliance on a closed wall, made of non-flammable material, flat, vertical so that the minimum distances required for installation and maintenance can be observed.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION! Only mount the appliance on a closed wall, made of non-flammable material, flat, vertical so that the minimum distances required for installation and maintenance can be observed.

safety_warnings.text: The boiler must be connected to a central heating system and/or domestic hot water supply network compatible with its efficiency and output.

source_refs.source_quote: The boiler must be connected to a central heating system and/or domestic hot water supply network compatible with its efficiency and output.

safety_warnings.text: The boiler can be installed outside in a partially protected place or in any case in a place where the boiler is not exposed to the direct action of atmospheric agents.

source_refs.source_quote: The boiler can be installed outside in a partially protected place or in any case in a place where the boiler is not exposed to the direct action of atmospheric agents.

safety_warnings.text: Before connecting the boiler, have professionally qualified personnel: a) Thoroughly wash all the piping of the system to remove any residues or impurities which could jeopardise proper operation of the boiler, even from a hygienic point of view.

source_refs.source_quote: Before connecting the boiler, have professionally qualified personnel: a) Thoroughly wash all the piping of the system to remove any residues or impurities which could jeopardise proper operation of the boiler, even from a hygienic point of view.

safety_warnings.text: Check that boiler is set up to operate with the available type of fuel. This can be seen written on the package and on the technical feature plate;

source_refs.source_quote: b)Check that boiler is set up to operate with the available type of fuel. This can be seen written on the package and on the technical feature plate;

safety_warnings.text: Check that the chimney/flue has an appropriate draught, without any bottlenecks, and that no exhausts from other appliances are inserted, unless the flue has been implemented to accommodate several utilities according to specific standards and regulations in force. Only after this check can the fitting between the boiler and chimney/flue be mounted;

source_refs.source_quote: c) Check that the chimney/flue has an appropriate draught, without any bottlenecks, and that no exhausts from other appliances are inserted, unless the flue has been implemented to accommodate several utilities according to specific standards and regulations in force. Only after this check can the fitting between the boiler and chimney/flue be mounted;

safety_warnings.text: The packaging elements (cardboard box, straps, plastic bags, etc.) must be kept out of the reach of children as they are potential sources of danger. Unical AG S.p.A. will not be held liable for damage to persons, animals or objects due to failure to comply with the instruction above.

source_refs.source_quote: The packaging elements (cardboard box, straps, plastic bags, etc.) must be kept out of the reach of children as they are potential sources of danger. Unical AG S.p.A. will not be held liable for damage to persons, animals or objects due to failure to comply with the instruction above.

safety_warnings.text: wear protective gloves

source_refs.source_quote: OBLIGATION! wear protective gloves

safety_warnings.text: The boilers must always be lifted and carried by two people, or a carrier carriage or special transport equipment must be used.

source_refs.source_quote: The boilers must always be lifted and carried by two people, or a carrier carriage or special transport equipment must be used.

safety_warnings.text: Place the appliance in rooms protected from frost.

source_refs.source_quote: Place the appliance in rooms protected from frost.

safety_warnings.text: Avoid installation in rooms with a corrosive or very dusty atmosphere.

source_refs.source_quote: Avoid installation in rooms with a corrosive or very dusty atmosphere.

safety_warnings.text: The appliance must only be installed on a vertical and solid wall which can support its weight. The wall must not be made of flammable material.

source_refs.source_quote: The appliance must only be installed on a vertical and solid wall which can support its weight. The wall must not be made of flammable material.

safety_warnings.text: In the event the boiler is replaced, ALWAYS replace the flue gas pipe as well.

source_refs.source_quote: In the event the boiler is replaced, ALWAYS replace the flue gas pipe as well.

safety_warnings.text: LT** total length is a reference value for the dimensioning of the ducts of A (intake) and S (Exhaust). Subtracting the values of LT reported, at values of bends* / terminals* / extensions* you get the value: if > 0 = OK POSSIBLE configuration if < 0 = NO WRONG configuration

source_refs.section_title: Calculation to determine the lengths of the exhaust configurations
source_refs.source_quote: CAUTION LT** total length is a reference value for the dimensioning of the ducts of A (intake) and S (Exhaust). Subtracting the values of LT repor- ted, at values of bends* / terminals* / extensions* you get the value: if > 0 = OK POSSIBLE configuration if < 0 = NO WRONG configuration

safety_warnings.text: The flue must comply with standards in force.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION: The flue must comply with standards in force.

safety_warnings.text: Ø 50 smoke exhaust, only for type B23P type and C53.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION Ø 50 smoke exhaust, only for type B23P type and C53.

safety_warnings.text: For the type of connection B23P the room follows the same installation rules for boilers with natural draught.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION: For the type of connection B23P the room follows the same installation rules for boilers with natural draught.

safety_warnings.text: The appliances connected to a collective flue, must all be of the same type and have equivalent combustion characteristics.

source_refs.section_title: FOLLOWS: Installation on collective flues in positive pressure
source_refs.source_quote: WARNINGS: - The appliances connected to a collecti- ve flue, must all be of the same type and have equivalent combustion characteri- stics.

safety_warnings.text: Terminal of collective duct must generate a draft.

source_refs.section_title: FOLLOWS: Installation on collective flues in positive pressure
source_refs.source_quote: Terminal of collective duct must generate a draft.

safety_warnings.text: Before carrying out any operation, disconnect the electrical power supply to the appliance.

source_refs.section_title: FOLLOWS: Installation on collective flues in positive pressure
source_refs.source_quote: Before carrying out any operation, di- sconnect the electrical power supply to the appliance.

safety_warnings.text: Before assembly, lubricate seals with non-corrosive grease.

source_refs.section_title: FOLLOWS: Installation on collective flues in positive pressure
source_refs.source_quote: Before assembly, lubricate seals with non-corrosive grease.

safety_warnings.text: The exhaust duct must be inclined, in the case of a horizontal duct, by 3° towards the boiler.

source_refs.section_title: FOLLOWS: Installation on collective flues in positive pressure
source_refs.source_quote: The exhaust duct must be inclined, in the case of a horizontal duct, by 3° towards the boiler.

safety_warnings.text: Number and characteristics of appliances connected to the collective flue, must be adequate to the characteristics of the collective flue.

source_refs.section_title: FOLLOWS: Installation on collective flues in positive pressure
source_refs.source_quote: Number and characteristics of applian- ces connected to the collective flue, must be adequate to the characteristics of the collective flue.

safety_warnings.text: Condensation can flow inside the boiler.

source_refs.section_title: FOLLOWS: Installation on collective flues in positive pressure
source_refs.source_quote: Condensation can flow inside the boiler.

safety_warnings.text: The collective flue must not be equipped with a draft-breaking-windproof device.

source_refs.section_title: FOLLOWS: Installation on collective flues in positive pressure
source_refs.source_quote: The collective flue must not be equip- ped with a draft-breaking-windproof device.

safety_warnings.text: The non-return valve (clapet) is a mandatory device in case of installations in positive pressure collective flue systems. This is an optional kit not present inside the boiler.

source_refs.section_title: FOLLOWS: Installation on collective flues in positive pressure
source_refs.source_quote: N.B.: The non-return valve (clapet) is a mandatory device in case of installa- tions in positive pressure collective flue systems. This is an optional kit not present inside the boiler.

safety_warnings.text: The assembly of the ducts must be carried out in such a way as to avoid condensation which would prevent the correct evacuation of the combustion products.

source_refs.section_title: FOLLOWS: Installation on collective flues in positive pressure
source_refs.source_quote: The assembly of the ducts must be carried out in such a way as to avoid con- densation which would prevent the correct evacuation of the combustion products.

safety_warnings.topic: Data Plate for Collective Smoke Duct
safety_warnings.text: A data plate must be present at the connection point with the collective smoke duct. Data plate must contained the following information: the collective flue is sized for type C (10) boilers, the maximum mass flow rate allowed of combustion products in Kg/h, size of the connection to common ducts, a warning regarding openings for air outlet and product inlet of the combustion of the smokes collective under pressure; such openings they must be closed and it must be verified their tightness when the boiler is disconnected, name of duct manufacturer, collective smoke or its identification symbol, Refer to the regulations in force for the discharge of combustion products and local provisions

source_refs.section_title: FOLLOWS: Installation on collective flues in positive pressure
